name: Barbell Back Squat
description: King of leg exercises — targets quads, glutes, hamstrings, and core with heavy loading.

name: Front Squat
description: Squat variation with bar racked on shoulders; emphasizes quads and upright torso.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
description: Unilateral squat with rear foot elevated; builds balance, quads, and glutes.

name: Walking Lunge
description: Dynamic lunge moving forward; targets quads, glutes, and stabilizers.

name: Reverse Lunge
description: Step backward into lunge for reduced knee stress and glute emphasis.

name: Goblet Squat
description: Squat holding a dumbbell or kettlebell at chest; beginner-friendly and quad-focused.

name: Leg Press
description: Machine-based compound movement for heavy quad and glute loading with back support.

name: Hack Squat
description: Machine squat with shoulder pads and footplate; targets quads with controlled motion.

name: Romanian Deadlift
description: Hip hinge targeting hamstrings and glutes with minimal knee bend.

name: Stiff-Leg Deadlift
description: Deadlift variation with straight legs to increase hamstring stretch and lower back engagement.

name: Good Morning
description: Barbell hip hinge with weight on back; advanced move for hamstrings and spinal erectors.

name: Glute Bridge
description: Lying hip extension targeting glutes; can be loaded with barbell or band.

name: Hip Thrust
description: Advanced glute bridge with shoulders on bench; maximizes glute activation under load.

name: Step-up
description: Step onto bench or box; unilateral movement targeting quads and glutes.

name: Pistol Squat
description: Advanced bodyweight single-leg squat requiring strength, mobility, and balance.

name: Leg Extension
description: Machine isolation for quads; great for finishing or rehab.

name: Lying Leg Curl
description: Prone machine curl targeting hamstrings with hip fixed.

name: Seated Leg Curl
description: Seated machine curl emphasizing hamstrings with hip flexion.

name: Standing Calf Raise
description: Targets gastrocnemius (upper calves) with ankle extension; can be loaded or bodyweight.

name: Seated Calf Raise
description: Targets soleus (deeper calf) with knees bent; usually done on machine.

name: Donkey Calf Raise
description: Bent-over calf raise with partner or machine weight on back for deep stretch and load.

name: Sissy Squat
description: Knee-dominant isolation with torso leaning back; emphasizes quads and knee stability.

name: Wall Sit
description: Isometric squat hold against wall; builds quad endurance and mental toughness.

name: Copenhagen Plank
description: Side plank with top leg elevated; targets hip adductors (inner thigh) for injury prevention.

name: Clamshell
description: Lying side leg raise with knees bent; activates gluteus medius (hip abductor).

name: Fire Hydrant
description: Quadruped leg lift to the side; targets glute medius and hip stabilizers.

name: Box Jump
description: Plyometric jump onto box; builds explosive power in quads and glutes.

name: Jump Squat
description: Explosive squat with jump; increases power and cardiovascular demand.

name: Skater Jump
description: Lateral plyometric jump; improves agility, balance, and outer glute/quad activation.

name: Kettlebell Swing
description: Hip-hinge power movement targeting glutes, hamstrings, and conditioning.
